title: Same; appeal by public officer, board, etc., without bond
doc_html:
§4432.  Same; appeal by public officer, board, etc., without bond

Such suspensive appeal, in the case of any officer, board, commission or department of the state government, or any political subdivision thereof, shall be without bond.
doc_text:
§4432.  Same; appeal by public officer, board, etc., without bond
Such suspensive appeal, in the case of any officer, board, commission or department of the state government, or any political subdivision thereof, shall be without bond.
